questions.text: To be at the end of one's tether
In the passage the term “urbanisation” has been used to refer to
options: the destruction of the greenery in the city
construction of concrete structures on a large scale
a change over from the rural life to the city life
the movement of people from villages to cities

questions.text: The phrase “absentee house sparrow” refers to
options: the sparrow that makes infrequent visits
the sparrow that has forgotten its habitat
the sparrow that has gone away from the urban areas
the sparrow that has become extinct

questions.text: According to the passage, the birds have made a comeback to the suburb because they
options: have been hunted down by the village people
Love to be amidst human beings
get food only where human beings live
they have been deliberately brought back by biologists
